name: Massage Oil
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Any combination of vegetable oils
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour 8 ounces of your chosen vegetable oils into a pretty bottle.
2. Add 12 drops of your selected essential oil to the vegetable oils.
Vegetable Oils: apricot kernel, sunflower, wheat germ, safflower, corn, olive, vitamin E, rosehip, avocado, jojoba, St. John's Wort, evening primrose.
Essential Oils: sandalwood, lavender, lemon, tangerine, ylang ylang, neroli, birch, sage.
